key_insight: Long-horizon autoformalization of research mathematics fails not only at hard lemmas, but at scale: statements drift, dependencies tangle, context decays, and local repairs corrupt distant work.
engineering_relevance: Potential relevance: theorem proving workflows and research evaluation.
